settings.title: TECHNICAL INFO
settings.content:
• Antimicrobial properties kill odor-causing bacteria
  • Keeps you odor-free by neutralising odor at the source.
  • Aluminum-free formula allows the body to sweat and breathe naturally
  • Prebiotic ingredients support the growth of 'good' bacteria to keep the odor-causing kind in check and support a healthy microbiome

settings.title: HOW TO APPLY
settings.content: Apply to clean, dry underarms. Two to three swipes. Let it settle before dressing.

settings.title: INGREDIENTS
settings.content: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Magnesium Hydroxide, Candelilla/Sunflower Wax, Tapioca Starch, Zinc Ricinoleate, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, SymDeo B15, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Ascorbyl Tetraisopalmitate, Bakuchiol, Panthenol, Tocopherol, Caprylyl Salicylic Acid, Alpha-Bisabolol, Fragrance (IFRA Certified), Aqua

settings.quote: “I Look Forward to Putting On Deodorant! This stuff is seriously the best. I didn't think it was possible to create an experience out of a product so basic as deodorant but everything from the can to the amazing scent is perfect. Bravo Ornella!”
settings.author: C.H.

settings.custom_liquid: BUILT FOR HEAT. BUILT FOR MOVEMENT.

settings.heading: A fresh, woody scent that sustains a warm, cozy feeling all day
settings.description: Black pepper wakes you up, sandalwood draws you in while refreshing coconut water and bergamot keep things from getting too heavy.

settings.title: odour fighting
settings.description: Three-mechanism protection. Magnesium hydroxide shifts skin pH, zinc ricinoleate traps odour molecules, and SymDeo B15 blocks the enzyme that causes smell at the source.

settings.title: ALUMINIUM-FREE
settings.description: No aluminium, no blocked pores. Your body sweats the way it's meant to. We just make sure it doesn't smell like it.

settings.title: NO WHITE CAST OR RESIDUE
settings.description: Baking soda-free and formulated for Indian skin tones. No chalky residue, no marks on dark clothes.

settings.title: SKINCARE-GRADE ACTIVES
settings.description: Bakuchiol for ingrown prevention. Vitamin C for tone. LHA for gentle exfoliation. Bisabolol and Panthenol to keep the skin barrier intact.

settings.title: IFRA-CERTIFIED FRAGRANCE
settings.description: Non-synthetic, allergen-conscious scents. Long-lasting without the irritation.

settings.title: REFILLABLE BY DESIGN
settings.description: You keep the case. You swap the pod. Less waste, same performance, every time.

settings.eyebrow: Built for motion. Made for skin. Everything in between, handled.
settings.heading: DEODORANT FOR MODERN, ACTIVE LIFE

settings.question: How is this different from regular body sprays or deodorant?
settings.answer: Regular sprays and deodorants attempt to mask body odor with overpowering fragrances. Ornella uses microbiome-friendly ingredients to neutralize odor-causing bacteria at the source, then layers on a balanced, elevated fragrance that's sure to get you compliments.

settings.question: Does this stop sweat?
settings.answer: No. Ornella is a deodorant, not an antiperspirant. It neutralizes odor-causing bacteria without blocking sweat, because sweating is a normal bodily function and we're not in the business of stopping it. No aluminum, no pore-clogging.

settings.question: How often do I have to reapply?
settings.answer: Once a day is enough. Apply 2-3 swipes on clean, dry underarms in the morning and you're covered.

settings.question: How long does one refill last?
settings.answer: With daily use at 2-3 swipes per application, one 45g refill lasts 60 days. When it runs out, just swap in a new one. Same case, new refill.

settings.question: Will this stain my clothes?
settings.answer: No. The formula is baking soda-free and leaves zero white cast on skin. It dries invisible and won't leave marks or residue on fabric.

settings.question: Are the scents for men or women?
settings.answer: Neither and both. All Ornella scents are gender-neutral, built for anyone who wants to smell good after sweating.

settings.question: I care about what I put on my body. Is Ornella clean?
settings.answer: Yes. No parabens, sulfates, phthalates, aluminum, or baking soda. Formulated to be effective without the ingredients you'd rather avoid.

settings.question: I TRAVEL A LOT. CAN I BRING THIS WITH ME?
settings.answer: Yes. The refill is a solid stick, so there are no liquid restrictions to worry about. It fits easily in a carry-on, won’t leak, and won’t get flagged at security. The case is compact enough to live in your gym bag, your travel kit, or both.

settings.question: Where are your products made?
settings.answer: All of our products are formulated and manufactured right here in the United States.
